Metadata.title: WebCode | Turnkey website for local business
Metadata.description: WebCode builds modern websites for offline businesses in Uzbekistan: website, CRM, Telegram/WhatsApp, domain and hosting in one launch-ready solution.

Hero.eyebrow: For service and expert businesses in Uzbekistan
Hero.subtitle: We launch a modern website in 3 languages, connect Telegram/WhatsApp, domain, hosting and a simple CRM for incoming leads.
Hero.description: You get one complete solution instead of a set of disconnected services.
Hero.supportText: We help with structure, rewrite raw text, build the website and launch everything turnkey without unnecessary complexity on your side.
Hero.microcopy: We reply within one business day. We will help you choose the right format and estimate the cost for your business.
Hero.orbit: Website, CRM, Telegram and turnkey launch for businesses in Uzbekistan

placeholder.title: HERO artwork
placeholder.description: The hand-with-cards visual will be placed here later while keeping the current section composition intact.

Audience.title: Who WebCode is for
Audience.description: We are a fit for businesses that need not just a website, but a clear tool for trust, service presentation and convenient lead capture.

service.title: Service businesses
service.description: Repairs, construction, cleaning, delivery, installation, car services, home services and field services.

expert.title: Expert businesses
expert.description: Clinics, dental practices, cosmetology, education, consulting, private specialists and personal services.

trust.title: Businesses that need trust
trust.description: When the website must look professional and help the client make a decision faster.

leads.title: Businesses that need order in leads
leads.description: When it matters to collect inquiries from forms and messengers in one system instead of losing them in chats.

WhyWebCode.title: Why WebCode
WhyWebCode.description: We build more than just a website. We deliver a launch-ready system: from structure and copy to CRM, messengers and publishing.
WhyWebCode.cta: Launch your project without the extra complexity
WhyWebCode.ctaDescription: We will show which format fits your business and define the next step clearly without technical chaos.

system.title: Not just a website, but a lead system
system.description: Website, forms, CRM and messengers work as one connected solution.

structure.title: We help with structure
structure.description: We do not expect a finished brief from you. We help shape the page logic, refine rough copy and turn everything into clear messaging.

languages.title: 3 languages built in from the start
languages.description: Russian, Uzbek and English are included in the base logic of the solution from the start. We can add any other language on request.

market.title: For the local market
market.description: We account for how businesses in Uzbekistan operate, what clients expect and which communication channels they actually use to reach out.

contractor.title: One contractor
contractor.description: No need to separately look for a designer, developer and specialists for domain setup, hosting and CRM just to make everything work together.

support.title: Support after launch
support.description: After publishing, we help with small edits and questions.
